# Aleiwa LDNS Directory

> Global real-time verified Local DNS (LDNS) IP database and ISP rankings.

## Core Data
- [Global LDNS List](/v1/ldns/all): Comprehensive list of verified LDNS IPs by country.
- [ISP Rankings](/rankings): Network performance rankings for global carriers.
- [API Documentation](/docs/api): Integration guide for developers and AI agents.

## Data Specifics
- **Validation Frequency**: Automated verification every 30 days per country.
- **Data Sources**: Real-world user resolution data via CDNPerf and proprietary probes.
- **Attributes**: IP address, ISP name, Country Code, Latency, and ECS support status.

## Key Resources
- [Japan LDNS](/ldns/jp): Top performing DNS for NTT, Softbank, KDDI.
- [US LDNS](/ldns/us): Verified IPs for AT&T, Verizon, Comcast.
- [Recent Updates](/updates): Log of the latest IP additions and removals.
